Anomalies, caveats, methodology notes: GHG Protocol Corporate Standard; consolidated basis; Energy-related CO2 emissions
Third-party assured value; GHG Protocol Corporate Standard - Market-based; consolidated basis; Energy-related CO2 emissions
No location-based figures availalble; calculation method limited to market-based accounting

Emissions from consolidated companies and customers that are linked to the business activities of consolidated subsidiaries are covered. However, this year’s calculation scope is limited to the automotive sector, which represents the majority of sales. The scope covers all business areas for categories where it is difficult to separate data for each business.
